vocab.meaning: độ bền vô song/không đối thủ
vocab.example: I justify the high cost of big-name brands because they offer unrivaled durability compared to fast-fashion alternatives.

vocab.meaning: những tiến bộ về mặt công nghệ
vocab.example: Major sportswear labels incorporate the latest technological advancements to enhance athletic performance and comfort.

vocab.meaning: chi tiêu nhằm phô trương (mua đồ hiệu để khoe)
vocab.example: I try to avoid conspicuous consumption, so I only buy branded shoes if they actually serve a functional purpose.
Famous running brands specialize in superior shock absorption, which is vital for protecting your joints during a marathon.

vocab.meaning: các phiên bản phát hành giới hạn
vocab.example: Sneakerheads often queue for hours just to get their hands on limited-edition releases from iconic brands.

vocab.meaning: có khả năng chống hàng giả
vocab.example: High-end footwear designers use unique serial numbers and holograms to make their products counterfeit-proof.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền (chi sạch túi)
vocab.example: Buying a new pair of designer boots can easily break the bank, so I usually wait for the end-of-season clearance.

vocab.meaning: lợi ích về mặt chỉnh hình/y khoa cho chân
vocab.example: Certain luxury brands are highly sought after because they offer specific orthopedic benefits for people with flat feet.

vocab.meaning: quy trình sản xuất đạo đức (nhân đạo)
vocab.example: I’ve recently switched to famous sustainable brands that guarantee ethical manufacturing and fair wages for their workers.

vocab.meaning: vẻ thanh lịch giản dị (không phô trương)
vocab.example: I prefer high-quality brands that offer understated elegance without having a giant logo plastered all over the side.
